statement: In every magma, Equation 573 (`x = y * (z * (z * (x * z)))`) implies Equation 719 (`x = y * (y * ((y * z) * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0257
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op z (op z (op x z))))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op y (op (op y z) x)))
